zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Baggott於1398年出生在英國斯塔福爾布利費爾德 霍爾時，她的父親John Bagot45歲，母親Beatrice Mallory41歲。她於1410年與Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall結婚。她去世於1437年在英國英格蘭爾赫夫享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Baggott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Badgett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Baggott  .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Baggott was born in 1398, in Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England, her father, John Bagot, was 45 and her mother, Beatrice Mallory, was 41. She married Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall in 1410. She died in 1437, in Hough, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Baggott est née en 1398, à Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bagot, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Mallory, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall en 1410. Elle est décédée en 1437, à Hough, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Baggott 1398 in Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bagot 45 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Mallory 41. Sie hat 1410 Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall geheiratet. Sie starb 1437 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Hough, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Baggott è nata il nel 1398 nel Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, John Bagot, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Mallory, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall nel 1410. Morì nel 1437, nel Hough, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Baggottが1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールド ハルで生まれた時，父John Bagotは45歳，母Beatrice Malloryは41歳であった。1410年にSir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhallと結婚した。彼女は1437年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアホーウで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Baggott(이)가 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bagot(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Mallory(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1410년 Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 허프에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Baggott nasceu em 1398, em Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bagot, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Mallory, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall em 1410. Ela faleceu em 1437, em Hough, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Baggott родилась в 1398 г. в местности блитфиелд холл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bagot было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Mallory, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall в 1410 г. Она умерла в 1437 г. в местности хоую, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Baggott nació en 1398, en Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bagot, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Beatrice Mallory, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir John Cheshire Davenport of Bromhall en 1410. Murió en 1437, en Hough, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
